# .xtrm Directory Reference

## Overview

`.xtrm/` is the **canonical location** for all xtrm-managed project data. Previously, xtrm assets were scattered across multiple directories:

| Old Location | New Location | Contents |
|---|---|---|
| `.claude/hooks/` | `.xtrm/hooks/` | Hook scripts |
| `.claude/settings.json` hooks | `.xtrm/hooks/` + policy compile | Hook configuration |
| `.agents/skills/` | `.xtrm/skills/` | Skills tier architecture |
| `.pi/extensions/` symlink | `packages/pi-extensions/extensions/` + global symlinks | Pi extension packages |
| `.pi/skills/` | `.xtrm/skills/active/pi/` | Runtime active view |
| Worktree sibling dirs | `.xtrm/worktrees/` | Git worktrees |

## Directory Layout

```
.xtrm/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ skills/              # Skills tier architecture
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ default/         # в†’ ../../skills (symlink)
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ optional/        # Optional packs (managed; populated by `xt install`)
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ user/packs/      # User packs (writable)
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ active/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ claude/      # Claude runtime active view
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ pi/          # Pi runtime active view
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ state.json       # Runtime enablement state
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ INVARIANTS.md    # Contract documentation
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ hooks/               # Hook scripts and compiled config
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ *.mjs            # Hook scripts
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ *.py             # Python hooks
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ hooks.json       # Compiled hook configuration
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ext-src/             # Pi extension source (git-tracked)
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ core/            # @xtrm/pi-core shared library
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ adapter.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ guard-rules.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ lib.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ logger.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ runner.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ session-state.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ package.json
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ beads/           # Extension packages
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ index.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ package.json
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ session-flow/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ quality-gates/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ custom-footer/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ xtrm-loader/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ xtrm-ui/
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ ...              # Other managed extensions
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ worktrees/           # Git worktrees for sessions
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ <branch>/        # Per-branch worktree
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ reports/             # Session close reports
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ <date>-<hash>.md
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ cache/               # Runtime cache
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ config/              # Project-local config
в”‚
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ registry.json        # Service registry
в”‚
в””в”Ђв”Ђ debug.db             # SQLite debug log
```

## What Lives Here

| Subdirectory | Purpose | Managed by |
|---|---|---|
| `skills/` | Three-tier skill model | `xt init`, `xt skills` |
| `hooks/` | Hook scripts + compiled config | Policy compile, `xt install` |
| `ext-src/` | Pi extension source code | `xt pi install` (syncs via global symlinks) |
| `worktrees/` | Session worktrees | `xt worktree`, `xt pi`, `xt claude` |
| `reports/` | Session handoff reports | `xt report generate` |
| `registry.json` | Service registry | Service-skills system |

## Extension Architecture

Pi extensions follow a **global symlink model**:

1. **Source**: `packages/pi-extensions/extensions/<name>/` contains the extension source (git-tracked)
2. **Global symlink**: `~/.pi/agent/extensions/<name>` в†’ `packages/pi-extensions/extensions/<name>/`
3. **Pi loads from global only** вЂ” no project-level conflicts

This means:
- Worktrees automatically share extensions with the main repo (no bootstrap needed)
- Multiple projects using the same xtrm-tools version share extensions
- No duplicate discovery issues (Pi only sees global directory)

The directory is named `ext-src` (not `extensions`) to prevent Pi from auto-discovering project-level extensions. If `.xtrm/extensions/` existed, Pi would load duplicates.

## Deprecation Notes

The following paths are **deprecated** and should not be used:

- `.agents/skills/` вЂ” migrated to `.xtrm/skills/`
- `.pi/skills/` вЂ” migrated to `.xtrm/skills/active/pi/`
- `.xtrm/extensions/` вЂ” renamed to `packages/pi-extensions/extensions/` in v0.7.3
- `.pi/node_modules/@xtrm/pi-core` вЂ” migrated to `packages/pi-extensions/src/core/`

The `xt init` command automatically symlinks `.claude/skills` and `.agents/skills` to `.xtrm/skills/default/` for backward compatibility.

Optional packs under `.xtrm/skills/optional/` are now populated by default during `xt install`; enable runtime activation with `xt skills enable <pack>`.
